mode: EAGER (--disable-cuda-graph) on BOTH, same node — isolates the selection BUDGET (2048 vs 4096), not the eager-vs-graph numerics gap
materiality_rule: A lifted UPLIFT over the DS-default baseline is MATERIAL only when the lifted recall point EXCEEDS the DS-default baseline 95% CP CI HIGH (directional, lifted > base_hi). N=20 makes one needle = 5pp.

op_points.ds_default: DS int8 top_k=2048 (default) / mem0.7 / eager / TP=8 / page64 / fp8-KV
op_points.ds_lifted: DS int8 lifted_budget_top_k=4096 top_k=2048 / mem0.7 / eager / TP=8 / page64 / fp8-KV
